title: hieracium lonchopodum
intro: Hieracium lonchopodum, also known as Hawkweed, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family and is native to Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant's roots and leaves have been used to treat various health issues, such as digestive problems, skin conditions, and fever, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Hieracium lonchopodum can be used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat digestive issues and skin conditions.
